message:
fix(search): fix spawn_blocking cancellation to match runtime_compat API

The previous code called .abort() on a spawn_blocking JoinHandle, but
Tokio documents that abort does not stop a running spawn_blocking task.
Migrate to the updated runtime_compat::spawn_blocking API which returns
a pinnable future, rely on the existing cooperative cancellation thread
for clean shutdown, and simplify error mapping now that the compat layer
yields String errors directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
